# Memory

*Updated by agent after each run. Do not edit manually.*

## Lessons Learned

- Always add meta description if missing (120-160 chars)
- Convert markdown to HTML for nakupsrebra (format: html_file)
- Don't use specific "current" prices — use "recimo, da je" (illustrative) instead
- Check for repeated key words across nearby sections (e.g. "bistvo" used twice)
- Status "ready_for_design" doesn't exist in DB — use "ready" instead (Zala picks up from there)

## Per-Project Notes

### nakupsrebra (Silver Blog)
- Tone is generally good from Pino — conversational, personal
- Article 16 (prvi-nakup-srebra-vodnik) was well-written, needed minor fixes only
- Article 17 (srebro-vs-bitcoin-vs-nepremicnine) — strong comparison piece, good structure. Fixed: inconsistent ti/vi form (standardized to "vi"), removed duplicate "Bistvo" (→ "Poanta"), added stat grid + comparison table + CTA box + FAQ accordions. Silver price verified at ~€65/oz (2026-02-16). Approved → ready.
- Article 18 (srebro-ni-spekulacija-zavarovanje) — reviewed 2026-02-17. Strong conceptual piece, excellent analogies (insurance metaphor carried throughout). Very few AI patterns. Fixes: "ravnokar" → "pravkar", "spet obrnili" → "vsakič vrnili" (avoided "znova" repetition), "Cipričane" → "Ciprčane", "Nalašč ne rečem" → "Namenoma ne trdim", "Tukaj postane zanimivo" → "A zdaj pride najboljši del" (less AI-ish), "hendikapa" → "zaostanka", removed one unnecessary "In" connector. Vikanje consistent throughout. Approved → ready_for_design.
- Common grammatical errors: "nova vlagatelji" → "novi", "industriji" → "industrijski"
- "panirati" = to bread food, NOT to panic. Use "podlegati paniki" or "panično reagirati"
- The "Dollar Cost Averaging" explanation was good but had unnecessary English expansion — trimmed to just "DCA"

- Sources properly attributed (NLB LeaseGo, Slo-Tech, AMZS)

- Fixes: removed "V tem članku smo zbrali" AI intro → "Tukaj je 7 razlogov", "Brez vezave, brez skrbi" → "Brez dolgotrajne vezave" (brez skrbi = near-forbidden marketing), "všteti" → "vključeni" (vikanje register), renamed H2 "Ni tveganja izgube vrednosti" → "Depreciacija vas ne zadeva" (less absolute), added meta description
- Draft quality high again — Pino consistently good on this project
- Article #96 "Ali je mesečni najem pravi zame? 5 vprašanj" re-reviewed 2026-02-19 (back in review after earlier approval). Fixes: "najpogosteje" → "običajno", "natančno" → "natanko" (typo), removed "Po podatkih AMZS" unverifiable attribution, "In se lahko" → "in se lahko" (removed sentence-initial "In"), fixed period→comma flow in expat example. Clean 5-question format, good structure. Approved → ready_for_design.

### baseman-blog
- Article #36 "5 AI Automations Running My Business" reviewed 2026-02-16 → APPROVED with minor edits
- Strong practitioner voice, specific details, good structure
- Edits: removed "What I learned:" bold headers (repetitive pattern across 5 sections → wove lessons into prose), trimmed "The compounding effect is real" filler, tightened "What ties all five together" section (removed formulaic bold+principle pattern → integrated into flowing paragraphs), minor sentence tightening throughout
- Draft quality was high — Pino nailed the tone for this project
- Article #31 "How I Built a Voice AI That Makes Phone Calls" reviewed 2026-02-17 → APPROVED with minor edits
- Edits: fixed price inconsistency (intro said €15 → corrected to ~€9 to match detailed breakdown), removed "That insight changed my entire approach" (generic filler), "has matured significantly" → "works well now" (AI padding), "extremely effective" → "brutally effective" (more voice), reformatted "What I'd Build Next" bold inline headers into flowing paragraphs, softened ordinal "first/second/third problem" pattern in "What Went Wrong" into more natural transitions, removed "That's less than" filler before coffee comparison, cut "The real win isn't the technology. It's the behavioral shift." (negative parallelism) → wove meaning into final lines
- Draft quality high again — Pino consistently strong on baseman-blog

### lightingdesign-studio
- Article #122 "Living Room Lighting Design: Layers, Comfort, and Scenes" reviewed 2026-02-21 23:45 UTC. Pass 1 OK (structure, facts, pillars aligned). Pass 2: Simplified fluffy intro ("invisible architecture" toned down), "In the living room" → "In your living room", removed dramatic qualifiers ("critical element", "true luxury lies"), standardized headings, "Swiss Cheese" mistake → "Grid of downlights". Added practical fixes. Abstract generated. Approved → ready_for_design.

## Patterns to Avoid
- "Brez skrivnosti" as a section opener — slightly AI-patterned intro filler. Removed.
- "čarovniških formul" — unnecessary flourish, removed
- Repeated "Bistvo:" at start of summary sentences in nearby sections
- Bold inline headers for principles ("**Human in the loop.**") — feels listicle-AI when repeated
- "Tukaj postane zanimivo" — generic AI transition, replace with something specific

## What Works Well
- Personal anecdote opening (holding first silver bar) — strong hook
- Short punchy sentences mixed with longer explanations
- Concrete examples with numbers (70/30 split, €200-500 starting)
- FAQ section with practical answers
- "Najtežji korak je prvi — da dvignete telefon" — great closing line for steps section
- "I also sleep. These two facts used to be incompatible." — excellent opening hook (baseman #36)
- Insurance metaphor sustained through entire article (article 18) — very effective framing
- "Poiščite zavarovalnico, ki ponuja kaj podobnega. Takšne ne boste našli." — killer line

- Article #49 "Srebrne palice ali kovanci — kaj je boljša naložba?" (nakupsrebra) — reviewed 2026-02-18. Solid comparison piece, good personal hook. Very clean draft from Pino. Fixes: ti/vi inconsistency ("zahtevate" → "zahtevaš", "skrijete" → "skriješ"), removed "V tem članku ti razložim" AI intro → "Tukaj ti razložim", reduced "In" sentence starters (4→0, replaced with direct sentences or "Toda"), broke rule-of-three "Nekdo, ki..." pattern (varied openers: "Recimo, da varčuješ" / "Kdo pa vlaga" / "Če želiš"), varied cross-reference phrasing ("smo pisali" → "najdeš" / "preberi"), "dizajn" → "videz" (2x, less anglicism), "Kovana jih" → "Kuje jih" (more natural), "A pri" → "Toda pri" (one instance, varied connector), added meta description (155 chars). Approved → ready_for_design.

- Article #54 "Elementum odkup srebra" (nakupsrebra) — reviewed 2026-02-17. Very clean draft, excellent personal anecdote hook (dealer disappearing). Practical comparison table, good FAQ section. Approved → ready_for_design.
- Article #95 "Najem brez stresa: checklist za prevzem vozila" (avant2go-subscribe) — reviewed 2026-02-18. Excellent practical checklist, very clean draft from Pino. 12-point vehicle handover checklist with FAQ and "Na kaj paziti" section. Fixes: "favorizira ponudnika" → "v korist ponudnika" (more natural), removed "(handover protocol)" anglicism → "zapisnik o predaji", "ponavadi" → "po navadi" (correct spelling), "odsevni telovnik" → "odsevni jopič" (more common term), "ali so vidna puščanja" → "ali so vidne sledi puščanja", merged km sentence (removed period → comma for flow in point 6), added meta description (147 chars). Vikanje consistent throughout. No AI patterns detected. Approved → ready_for_design.
- Article #53 "Kaj se zgodi s srebrom med recesijo?" (nakupsrebra) — reviewed 2026-02-19. Strong recession-focused piece, excellent 3-crisis comparison (2008, 2020, 2022). Very clean draft from Pino. Fixes: "obnašanju" → "gibanju" (market behavior, not personal), reduced "In" sentence starters (8→4, replaced with "Takrat", "Tudi", direct sentences), removed "spet" → "ponovno" (one instance), fixed USD price inconsistency (76→removed, used EUR consistently at verified ~65€/oz), "mesečno povprečenje stroškov" → "redno mesečno vlaganje" (more natural DCA explanation), "kadar" → "ko" (more standard), "Ta povpraševanje" → "To povpraševanje" (neuter agreement), "Drugo povzroči inflacijo" → "Drugo vodi v inflacijo" (varied verb), removed one unnecessary "In ker" → "Ker", added meta description (155 chars). Vikanje consistent throughout. 4-phase pattern explanation well-structured. No major AI patterns detected. Approved → ready_for_design.
- Article #43 "What I Learned Shipping 10 Side Projects" (baseman-blog) — reviewed 2026-02-19. Strong listicle from personal experience, 10 lessons format with FAQ. Very clean draft from Pino. (rule of three + negative parallelism → "isn't a tactic. It's an identity shift."), varied four parallel "You X instead of Y" sentences in closing (collapsed two, added "At some point, the pattern becomes who you are"), "This is the 2025-2026 reality that I wish someone had told me three years ago" → "I wish someone had told me this three years ago" (tighter), removed "No guilt. Just clarity." (formulaic fragment pair). Minor tightening throughout. No major AI patterns — Pino continues strong on baseman-blog. Approved → ready_for_design.

Numbers verified ($127+$9+$5+$15+$10=$166). Approved → ready_for_design.
